string.text: Who the hell are you?!
Stalker, just a stalker. You must be the technician - Pianist?
Maybe yes, maybe no. It all depends on what you need from me. How did you even find me?
So it's definitely you. Finding you wasn't hard, first I found your flash drive, and then you yourself. Stalkers from the camp near the farm are looking for you.
Looking for me? Why the hell would they need me? To bother me again? To tell newcomers how to live? Huh?
How should I know? They asked me, so I did it.
Alright then, let's make a deal. You go to Tokha and explain that you found me, but I’m not going back to the camp. If they want something from me, they can get off their asses and come here. Clear?
More than clear.
Stalker, wait! Who are you and what are you looking for here?
Hunter, I answer to Zmey. I’m looking for my friend - Bison, you know him?
Really! Alright, I’ll talk to our leader, he’s a smart guy and knows electronics well, so I think he’ll help with this issue, but if not, we’ll figure something out.
Alright, here are two PDAs, and I need any information about your technician. What's his name, what else does he do besides repairs, or what did he do before he disappeared?

The technician’s name is Pianist, but I can't tell you what he's into, I haven't been keeping track of him. I don’t know anything about his recent activities either, but I’ll talk to the guys and let you know right away. By the way, the last time they saw the technician was near the old factory, there's also a gravity anomaly there. I’ll send you the coordinates right now.
Alright, then I’ll head there first, and maybe clear out some mutants along the way.

Hunter, that’s good, now there’s someone to shoot the wild animals, because we have eighty percent greenery, and the wildlife in the Zone doesn’t exactly “get along,” if you know what I mean. As for your Bison, he’s been here, he was with two other stalkers, one of them I think was called Plumber, and the second… Hm… Maybe Phoenix or Felix, like that cat from the commercial, I guess.

Well, that’s something. As for the local fauna, I think I can help you with that if you pay well and tell me more about Bison and the guys who were with him. By the way, do you have a technician in your camp?
We’ll pay not a lot, but enough to get by, but our technician is missing.
Missing? And you didn’t search for him?!

We searched, but where and to whom could we search here? Greenery?! Who’s afraid to even stick their nose out of the camp, or us experienced stalkers who can't leave the camp because we’re guarding this very Greenery. It’s a mess, brother, like in that saying: "Want and can't have..."
Listen, I could help with searching for your technician, if you want, but in return, I’ll need a favor.
That would be great! What kind of favor do you need?

I have two PDAs, both are locked, but one of them looks like it’s cloned or the information is heavily erased. I need to unlock one of them, and with the second, figure out who it belongs to or belonged to and try to recover any information if possible.
So you're the Hunter who decided to help with searching for our Technician?
That's right, actually, that’s why I came. I was around the place where your technician was last seen and found a flash drive, but the problem is... it’s locked.
Really! I understand you want me to unlock it? If so, hand it over, and you can go take a walk, I’ll let you know when I’m done.
Alright, I’ll be waiting.
Here you are, so did you manage to find Pianist?
I did, he asked me to pass a couple of words to you.

Zmey, don't interrupt, let me finish. So, Felix was like a clean slate, but he quickly understood what was going on. He wandered around the area, did some tasks for us, and then it turned out that the "blues" were hunting him. He apparently solved the issue by just shooting them all. I don’t know how exactly it went, but Garik went to the place of the massacre and saw the bodies... So, where was I... Oh yes! After dealing with the "blues", he packed his stuff and headed for the old factory, the anarchists are not far from there, by the way, you passed by there when you were looking for Pianist.
Yes, I remember that factory, there were a lot of mutants there...
That's the reality. So, look for him there, maybe you'll get lucky.
Alright, thanks for the tip.
So, what happened?
Here’s what I was told: I won’t be returning to the camp. If they want anything from me, they can get their asses up and come here. That’s it.

Got it. By the way, about those PDAs, I managed to unlock one of them. As for the other, I can’t help with that. It’s completely unregistered, just a password was set and the coordinates of our camp were added, and that’s all...
Hmm... Not much, but better than nothing. By the way, about the clean PDA, I figured as much, but since I didn’t have the knowledge, I had to bring it to you.
Got it. Well, Zmey, if you ever want to help us, you're always welcome.

By the way, speaking of help, I think we could help each other. I’m not sure if Garik told you why I’m here, but I’ll repeat it. I’m looking for Bison and his group, or whatever’s left of it. The PDAs I gave you belonged to members of his group.

Garik mentioned your reason for visiting, but I can’t tell you much. I’ll tell you what I know. Bison was here, and he had two companions: Plumber and Felix. They were looking for some kind of artifact or something similar. They stayed with us for about three days, and then they just left. The only thing that might help you is that we later found Felix, but he was strange, like his brain had been formatted like a flash drive...
That’s interesting, where is Felix now?
So, what's going on with the case?
Here it is, safe and sound.
In progress.
Great, here’s the gun and some ammo for it, just as we agreed. By the way, our leader wanted to have a word with you, he’s sitting to the right of me at the table.
Thank you! Have a chat? Alright.
By the way, if you ever feel like earning a little and helping our humble clan, you know where to find me.
I’ll keep that in mind.
...Thanks again, Snake! If it weren’t for you, blind dogs would’ve already eaten me...
It’s alright, I’m just glad I got there in time, nothing else matters. But tell me, what happened to you?

Oh... Well, you know the purpose of our mission, so I won’t repeat it. Anyway, yesterday, Bizon, Grek, and I headed to a village, there were rumors that we could find some supplies, you know, take a break from our main task. We got to the village, and before we knew it, a sniper was firing at us, and then more guys joined in. We tried to hold them off, but it was in vain, so we decided to retreat. I told the guys I’d cover their retreat and try to catch up. They moved, and I started shooting in all directions to draw all the fire on me so they could escape. Eventually, as soon as the guys were out of sight, the fire began to subside... I thought that was it... Finally hit someone, and they decided to wait until I ran out of ammo. I wasn’t behind the house for long, one of the attackers flanked me and shot me, luckily not in the heart, though it was close. Bleeding out, I lay there for a couple of hours, then I started crawling toward the camp, but I was out of strength and sent a distress signal, and then you showed up.
Born lucky, huh? Who attacked you? Were you able to see who they were?
I was able not only to see them but also to hear their conversation.
Now that's interesting, tell me more.

They were mercenaries, and from the conversation, it was clear they were hired to eliminate Bizon, and our group was just collateral damage. I don’t know who or why they wanted Bizon gone, but the fact remains: the mercenaries were after Bizon.
Shit... Where do we even start looking for him? Where could he have gone with Grek?
We didn’t have a permanent camp, so I can’t give you a specific location. Sorry.
Alright, you rest and regain your strength. I’ll work with the local guys, maybe they can help with the search.
Hey, stalker! Where are you from, and where’s your gear?
Me? I escaped from the bandits, and my gear is apparently with them, “stored” for safekeeping... Anyway, never mind that, the main thing is that I managed to get my legs moving.
Well, you sure are lucky! No denying that.
Yeah, yeah, listen, maybe you can help me out? I just need a gun, I can’t go anywhere without one...
Help you out? I think I can. Here’s the deal, I’ll give you a gun and some ammo for it, and you go grab something for me. Sound good?
Deal! What and where do I need to grab?
So, if you head northwest, you’ll find a ravine, and in the ravine, there’s a small group of anomalies. That’s where the container I need is.
Sounds simple enough, I’ll give it a try.
Help...
Buri?! Damn, I’ll carry you to the camp, hang in there, bro!
Peace to you, Garik! Toha said you picked up a distress signal?
Too bad about the guy...
Agreed, not the best fate... However, there's a silver lining, the creature's dead, which means the chances of anyone else dying just went down. Alright, shall we head back?
Agreed... Yes, let's go back.
Yes, there's something to it, and the signal is not far from here. Listen, shall we check it out?
Sure, I don't have anything else to do for now.

Oh, Snake! I was told recently that they saw a couple of stalkers in excellent gear near the southwest settlement, they were heading towards the swamp, not far from here. They’re probably the ones you're looking for. Also, they saw some lone mercenary there, I don't think he would interest you, but still.
A mercenary? Are you sure?
I think so. All our groups are marked on my PDA, and we've never seen those guys before.
Alright, I'll go check it out, maybe it really is Bison and Greek.
Good day, as we agreed: I and my men are here and ready for any task you set.
Excellent, Lieutenant! Don’t you have any questions about the operation?
Snake, I’ve already told you I know you well, so I knew you wouldn’t call me and my men unless you really needed us, that’s why we're here.
You flatter me, well, never mind, I’ll call in the rest of the guys and we’ll move out.
My men and Toha’s men are ready, shall we start?
Let’s go!
The enemy is defeated, our troops are holding position.
Got it, did you see Bison?
Yes... He’s behind that building. Snake, he’s dead.
What?! No!
Have you or your men encountered mercenaries in the area recently?
I’ve got some good news.
I didn’t think the guys from Duty would agree so quickly. Though, they seem to have their own score to settle with the mercs. By the way, when can we expect them?
The commander of the Duty squad said they’ll be here by midnight tomorrow, they’re coming to the farm.
Great, we’ll get ready. By the way, while you were talking to the Duty guys, Garik caught another S.O.S. signal. Go check it out.
Alright, I’ll go talk to Garik.

Yes, just yesterday some guys from the Syndicate showed up here and settled at the northern checkpoint. I don’t know why they’re here, and honestly, I don’t want to know. It’s dangerous to know the mercs’ plans, I’ve learned that the hard way.
I understand. Listen, do you have any desire to get rid of some uninvited guests?
Let’s just say, I’m not against it, but I’m afraid that even if we get rid of these scumbags, others will show up.
I don’t think so. Not long ago, a group from Duty wiped out a squad of mercs near the old research institute, and we haven’t seen any more of them. I think it’ll be the same with this group.
You think so? I don’t want to take risks. But if the guys from the honorable Duty group came here and helped out, the mercs wouldn’t notice our presence.
Hmm... I think I can manage to invite them.
Now, that’s a different story! Once the Duty guys arrive, I’ll send you some of my men, I think that’s fair!
Got it, I’ll go try to contact the guys.
Hello! Can you hack this PDA?
After you brought me the radio materials, I think I’m capable of quite a lot now! So give me the PDA and come back in a couple of hours.
Glad to hear it! Here’s the PDA, let me know when it’s ready if you can.
Got your message.

What message? Oh, right! I almost forgot, too many things going on, but about that PDA, I unlocked it. There isn’t much information on it, just some map markings, mentions of a group, an artifact, and a couple of notes.
Alright, I’ll take a look now.
Found the artifact, here it is.
Excellent, it’s a gravity-based artifact! Here’s a little gift from me, and our trader wanted to talk to you, go speak with him. Meanwhile, I’ll think about how to help with your problem.
Thank you, this gun will come in handy. As for the trader, I’ll go talk to him now.
I found the artifact - here it is.
Great, an electric-type artifact! Here's a small gift from me, and our trader was looking for you, you should talk to him, and I'll think about how to help you with your problem.
Thank you, this is a nice weapon - it will come in handy, as for the trader, I'll go talk to him now.
I found the artifact - here it is.
Great, an acid-type artifact! Here's a small gift from me, and our trader was looking for you, you should talk to him, and I'll think about how to help you with your problem.
Thank you, any weapon will be useful now, as for the trader, I'll go talk to him now.
Hello, hello, and what should I call you?
I respond to Snake, I'm a hunter by profession.

Any artifacts, I'll mark some anomalous fields on your PDA, wander around there, maybe you'll find something. By the way, I wouldn't advise you to go near the gangsters now, revenge is a dangerous thing... However, there's no rush! Also, I wouldn't advise going to the village to the north of here. The guys reported spotting a group of unknowns, and there's some creature wandering around... Anyway, I suggest you listen to this advice.
Alright, I hear you. I'll go "check" the anomalies...
Alright, Snake the hunter. They call me Toha, I'm the leader here.
I see, Garik said you wanted to talk about something.
That's right, so I'm curious, how did you end up with the gangsters, how did you escape from there, and what are you doing in these Godforsaken lands?

Oh, this is probably the funniest part! I'll tell you everything from the beginning, and then we'll get to the point. So, I'm looking for a stalker named Bison and his group, or rather, what's left of them. My search led me to a collector, which was a shortcut to here. When I was heading back to the surface, they hit me on the head and took my stuff, I woke up in the bandits' den, it was strange that no one was guarding me, but I used that to my advantage, escaped through the fence, and stumbled upon your camp. That's how it happened.

Well, that's quite a story, I wouldn't envy you. Anyway, you got out, thank God. I understand you need gear now, I can give you some, but don't get too excited, you'll have to work for the good of our clan, I think you won't refuse, because you have no other choice. Also, I'll try to help you with your search, but that's for later.
Yeah... Refusing means dying, not much of a prospect. What should I do, and how can you help with my search?

Here's some gear and a few medical supplies. I see you already have a pistol, but one pistol won't be enough for these parts, there's a stash around here, the owner probably won't need it anymore, but it will be just right for you, it's somewhere on the camp's territory, you'll find it. As for the work, for starters, you'll have to work as an artifact collector, it's dangerous work, but if you have a good detector and the right skills, you shouldn't have any problems.
Thanks. You say I should be an artifact collector? What kind of artifacts do you need?
Who are you? And which faction?!
Stalker, just a stalker. They call me Snake.
What are you looking for here?
Information.
I don't like you!
And I'm not a woman to care whether you like me...
Yeah? Damn, I forgot to replace that, alright, enough jokes. Anyway, the camp's entrance is closed for you now, but if you complete a task, you'll be able to come here like it's your home.
Speak, I'm listening.
To the east of our camp, a group of bandits has settled. As you can guess, they are a problem for us, so if they disappeared, we would be grateful. Do you understand what I'm saying?
Got it, I'll be back soon.
What's up with my reward?
Here you go, hard-earned!
The squad is dead, but the bandits are also dead...
Sad to hear... Anyway, here's what you earned.
Do you need any help? Toha said you wanted something.
I need help. Remember, I hired you to take out the bandit gang that was robbing our guys near the camp? Well, it's time to clean up their hideout.
You say "clean up"... I'm not against it, but I won't go there alone.
I'm not really in the mood for it, maybe another time.
I wouldn't send you there alone, it's too risky. I've already arranged for some guys to join the cleanup. They'll be waiting for you near the bandits' camp. The leader's called Groza.
Now that's more like it! I'll go then.
Are you our extra shooter? Don't worry, my guys are solid! They're used to handling firearms, so let's move!
Let's go!
Looks like we got them all!
Seems like it, alright, we'll secure the area here. You go back to the camp, your reward awaits you for helping us.
Okay, see you.
The squad is dead...
What?! How?!

They were killed by Monoliths. I don't know the exact details, but that's what happened. When I was searching the village, I spotted a Monolith squad, and in the shed, there were corpses. I decided to investigate, but first had to deal with those fanatics. In the end, I checked the bodies, and they were your guys. I found some documents on the squad leader. Here, take them [Giving documents] - maybe they're important.
Ugh... This is really unpleasant... Damn, we lost those guys... May they rest in peace. Leave the documents, it seems like they were after them... Damn...
Alright, I'll leave you to it...
Hello! I heard on the radio that you lost a squad?
Yes, that's true... The guys haven't contacted me yet, though they should have returned to the camp a while ago. I gathered a team to search for them, but so far, no results.
If you want, I can help search for them.

That would be great! Look [Shows map], here is where they last made contact - it's an abandoned village, mostly mutants there, but there are a couple of houses where you can rest. They may have stopped here before returning to base. I think you should check the village, since I sent the squad to the presumed resting spot.
Okay, I understand. I'll let you know as soon as I find out something.
Can I help you with something?

Help? Maybe. You see, we just set up our base, haven't had time to clear the area yet. And the bandits are here: robbing stalkers who bring me supplies. At this rate, I'll have nothing to trade soon. Just yesterday, another bandit squad appeared. They are bold, they set up right across from our base! Could you do something about them?
No, not at the moment.
No problem! They'll remember this lesson for a long time.
You know, maybe another time.
About the bandits.
So, how did it go?
I took them out.
Not yet.
Don't drag it out too long.
Thanks a lot! Here's your reward!
